title: ateramnus lucidus
intro: Ateramnus lucidus, also known as the Chinese thorntail or thorny amaranth, is a plant species in the amaranth family native to Southeast Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ateramnus lucidus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
